tool.name: cors_scanner
tool.description: Scan and test for CORS misconfigurations including origin reflection, null origin acceptance, and credential leakage.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Generate test origins to probe CORS configuration - Test for origin reflection vulnerabilities - Check if null origin is accepted - Analyze CORS response headers for security issues - Generate exploitation code for confirmed vulnerabilities - Identify cache poisoning via missing Vary header

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The CORS scanning action to perform: - scan: Generate test origins for manual testing - test_origin: Test if specific origin is reflected - test_null: Generate null origin exploit - generate_report: Full vulnerability analysis report

parameter.name: target_url
parameter.description: The URL to test for CORS vulnerabilities

parameter.name: test_origin
parameter.description: Specific origin to test (required for test_origin action)

parameter.name: response_headers
parameter.description: CORS response headers to analyze (dict of header name to value)

returns.description: Scan results including test origins, vulnerability analysis, and exploitation code

tool.examples:
# Generate test origins
scan https://api.example.com/user
# Test specific origin
test_origin https://api.example.com/user https://evil.com {"Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "https://evil.com", "Access-Control-Allow-Credentials": "true"}
